narrative:
New Jasper township has 1,952 registered voters, with 43.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.2 percentage points.
